core_etfs.description: Small ETF universe for fast intraday setup testing.
core_etfs.notes: ETF list is manually curated and not intended to represent historical index membership.

liquid_large_caps.description: Current liquid large-cap watchlist for early daily and intraday research.
liquid_large_caps.notes: Current winners are overrepresented. Use for workflow development, not clean historical claims.

sp500_current.description: Current S&P 500 constituent list fetched from Wikipedia.
sp500_current.notes: Current-only S&P 500 list. Good for daily workflow development; not valid for clean historical index backtests.

sp500_sample.description: Starter sample, not a complete current or historical S&P 500 list.
sp500_sample.notes: Use only for quick tests. Replace with point-in-time S&P 500 constituents before serious backtests.
